HEXTECH_MAYHEM.title: Hextech Mayhem
HEXTECH_MAYHEM.description: At the start of Acts [blue]1[/blue], [blue]2[/blue], and [blue]3[/blue], choose Hextech runes and give monsters of that Act a Hextech bonus of the same rarity.
HEXTECH_SILVER_RUN.title: Silver Run
HEXTECH_SILVER_RUN.description: All Hextech runes refreshed this run are Silver tier.
HEXTECH_GOLD_RUN.title: Gold Run
HEXTECH_GOLD_RUN.description: All Hextech runes refreshed this run are Gold tier.
HEXTECH_PRISMATIC_RUN.title: Prismatic Run
HEXTECH_PRISMATIC_RUN.description: All Hextech runes refreshed this run are Prismatic tier.
